candidate: TRAP-COMMIT: Venus flytrap two-stimulus integrate-and-fire pre-commit gate for expensive LLM ops; first match pre-loads latent flag, second match within sliding window commits; rejects single-trigger false positives.

per_result_judgments.title: Venus flytrap — Wikipedia
per_result_judgments.rationale: Source-domain biology page; no LLM mechanism overlap.

per_result_judgments.title: Mixture of Attention Spans (heterogeneous sliding-window)
per_result_judgments.rationale: Shares 'sliding-window' lexeme only; targets attention efficiency, not 2-stimulus commit-gate.

per_result_judgments.title: TEAM Temporal-Spatial Expert Activation MoE Diffusion LM (2026/02)
per_result_judgments.rationale: Threshold-based single-signal expert activation; lacks two-stimulus temporal double-match semantics. All three signals below threshold.

per_result_judgments.title: Two-Stage Expert Offloading MoE Inference (2025)
per_result_judgments.rationale: Two-stage staged-execution with locality predictor is functionally adjacent to pre-commit/commit pattern; func at threshold.

per_result_judgments.title: Dual LLM pattern (Simon Willison 2023)
per_result_judgments.rationale: Role-separation pattern, not a 2-stimulus temporal commit-gate.

per_result_judgments.title: Two-Stimulus Pre-Commit Gate for Expensive LLM Operations (2026/03)
per_result_judgments.rationale: Direct twin: title-level overlap on 'two-stimulus pre-commit gate' for expensive LLM operations including tool-call and CoT expansion. Strong hit on all three axes.

per_result_judgments.title: Integrate-and-Fire Tool-Call Routing for LLM Agents (2025/12)
per_result_judgments.rationale: Same mechanism: accumulator with reset over sliding window, commits tool-call only after k>=2 matched signals. Hits on all axes.

per_result_judgments.title: FineMoE: Latency-Memory Tradeoff MoE (EuroSys 2026)
per_result_judgments.rationale: MoE serving efficiency via expert pre-activation, not a 2-stimulus commit gate.

summary: Two prior works (ranks 6 and 7) are direct mechanistic twins of TRAP-COMMIT: rank 6 names the exact 'two-stimulus pre-commit gate for expensive LLM operations' framing, and rank 7 implements integrate-and-fire tool-call routing with k>=2 commit over a sliding window. A third functional-adjacent hit (rank 4, two-stage MoE offloading) further reduces novelty. The candidate's distinctive temporal double-match commit-gating is therefore already published — high overlap, not novel.
